'''竏嗷-sh-s-p''' ('''karashsepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:webchat|webchat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:webchat|webchat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗷-sh-s-p
|-
! Lemma
| karashsepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirashsepoko|thirashsepoko]] || [[word:jirashsepoko|jirashsepoko]] || [[word:shirashsepoko|shirashsepoko]] || [[word:kirashsepoko|kirashsepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurashsepoko|thuthurashsepoko]] || [[word:jujurashsepoko|jujurashsepoko]] || [[word:shushurashsepoko|shushurashsepoko]] || [[word:kukurashsepoko|kukurashsepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦrashsepoko|thﾃｦrashsepoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦrashsepoko|jﾃｦrashsepoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦrashsepoko|shﾃｦrashsepoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦrashsepoko|kﾃｦrashsepoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharashsepoko|tharashsepoko]] || [[word:jarashsepoko|jarashsepoko]] || [[word:sharashsepoko|sharashsepoko]] || [[word:karashsepoko|karashsepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
